narrative:
North Olmsted-03-E (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 992 registered voters, with 58.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.2 percentage points.
